subject: Small white cotton-puff creature resting in green grass among white flowers
description: A small round creature composed largely of white fluffy cotton-like material sits or rests amid lush green grass. The creature has a simple round face with dark eyes and a small expression, partially obscured by the cotton tufts surrounding it. Several white daisy-like flowers grow nearby, echoing the creature's own white cotton appearance. The background is soft green and blue, slightly blurred, suggesting an outdoor meadow setting. The overall image is gentle and pastoral. The card border is purple/psychic-type.
foreground: small white fluffy round creature amid green grass and white flowers
background: soft green meadow with pale blue sky, white daisy flowers
emotion: gentle and calm; soft posture, no tension
